subject: Gaming
title: Diablo Immortal: Pay-to-Win Backlash
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Diablo Immortal: Pay-to-Win Backlash.

hook.text: Maxing a character in Diablo Immortal costs over $100,000. The community branded it gaming's worst monetization.

buildup.text: Blizzard launched Diablo Immortal as free-to-play with aggressive microtransactions for power upgrades.

discovery.text: Analysis showed that fully upgrading gems required either years of free play or spending six figures.

twist.text: Despite the backlash, the game earned over $500 million in its first year. Outrage didn't stop the money.

climax.text: Diablo Immortal showed the gap between vocal community anger and actual spending behavior.

punchline.text: Everyone hated the monetization. It earned half a billion anyway.

quiz.question: How much would it cost to max a character in Diablo Immortal?
